parameters.query:
=WITH preferred_store AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT c.store_id
      FROM public.carts c
      WHERE c.user_id = {{ (($('Start').first().json.tool_input || {}).chat_id || $('Start').first().json.chat_id) }}::bigint
        AND c.status = 'active'
      ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    (
      SELECT s.store_id
      FROM public.stores s
      ORDER BY COALESCE(s.onboarding_step, 0) DESC, s.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, s.store_id DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )
  ) AS store_id
),
active_cart AS (
  SELECT c.cart_id, c.updated_at AS cart_updated_at
  FROM public.carts c
  CROSS JOIN preferred_store ps
  WHERE c.user_id = {{ (($('Start').first().json.tool_input || {}).chat_id || $('Start').first().json.chat_id) }}::bigint
    AND c.status = 'active'
    AND (ps.store_id IS NULL OR c.store_id = ps.store_id)
  ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
),
recent_skus AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.sku, MAX(ci.added_at) AS last_added
  FROM public.cart_items ci
  WHERE ci.cart_id = (SELECT cart_id FROM active_cart LIMIT 1)
  GROUP BY ci.sku
  ORDER BY last_added DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 3
)
SELECT
  {{ (($('Start').first().json.tool_input || {}).chat_id || $('Start').first().json.chat_id) }}::bigint AS chat_id,
  ps.store_id,
  COALESCE(s.store_name, 'your kirana store') AS store_name,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(ci.quantity)
    FROM public.cart_items ci
    WHERE ci.cart_id = (SELECT cart_id FROM active_cart LIMIT 1)
  ), 0)::int AS cart_item_count,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(ci.quantity * ci.price_at_addition)
    FROM public.cart_items ci
    WHERE ci.cart_id = (SELECT cart_id FROM active_cart LIMIT 1)
  ), 0)::numeric AS cart_total,
  (SELECT cart_updated_at FROM active_cart LIMIT 1) AS cart_updated_at,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(sku ORDER BY last_added DESC)
    FROM recent_skus
  ), '[]'::json)::text AS recent_skus_json
FROM preferred_store ps
LEFT JOIN public.stores s ON s.store_id = ps.store_id;

=INSERT INTO customer_preferences (chat_id, browse_context, updated_at)
VALUES ({{ $json.chat_id }}::bigint, {{ $json.browse_context_to_set ? `'${String($json.browse_context_to_set).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET browse_context = EXCLUDED.browse_context, updated_at = NOW();
SELECT 1 AS done
